news.title:
DLF completes ₹710.2 Cr deal with Srijan Realty, transferring DLF Techpark II SEZ asset.
The deal also includes the sale of a 17.75-acre land parcel in Kolkata.
news.summary:
DLF completes ₹710.2 Cr deal with Srijan Realty, transferring DLF Techpark II SEZ asset.
The deal also includes the sale of a 17.75-acre land parcel in Kolkata.

news.title:
Adani Ent, LIC, DLF, HDFC Bank, and Tata Group stocks hit 52-week lows amidst market downturn.
Geopolitical tensions, rising crude prices, and RBI measures create challenging equity market backdrop.
news.summary:
Adani Ent, LIC, DLF, HDFC Bank, and Tata Group stocks hit 52-week lows amidst market downturn.
Geopolitical tensions, rising crude prices, and RBI measures create challenging equity market backdrop.

news.title:
Nifty Realty surges 4% as oil prices ease; Phoenix Mills, DLF gain up to 5%.
Sector hit 15% recently; analysts cautious due to inflation, rate sensitivity.
news.summary:
Nifty Realty surges 4% as oil prices ease; Phoenix Mills, DLF gain up to 5%.
Sector hit 15% recently; analysts cautious due to inflation, rate sensitivity.

news.title:
JPMorgan rates DLF Overweight with a target price of Rs 800, citing a 38% stock drop.
DLF's Rs 600bn launch pipeline, 137msf land bank, and zero gross debt drive positive outlook.
news.summary:
JPMorgan rates DLF Overweight with a target price of Rs 800, citing a 38% stock drop.
DLF's Rs 600bn launch pipeline, 137msf land bank, and zero gross debt drive positive outlook.

news.title:
Real estate stocks like Godrej Properties, DLF, and Sobha fall 3-4% amid US-Iran war impact.
Sector faces tile supply issues due to gas shortages; Realty index down 10% in March, led by Lodha's 16% drop.
news.summary:
Real estate stocks like Godrej Properties, DLF, and Sobha fall 3-4% amid US-Iran war impact.
Sector faces tile supply issues due to gas shortages; Realty index down 10% in March, led by Lodha's 16% drop.

news.title:
DLF Ltd. gained 3.4%, hitting Rs 548 on 17 Mar 2026.
The stock outperformed the Realty sector and Sensex after a 4-day decline.
news.summary:
DLF Ltd. gained 3.4%, hitting Rs 548 on 17 Mar 2026.
The stock outperformed the Realty sector and Sensex after a 4-day decline.

news.title:
Adani Enterprises, DLF, TCS fell sharply amid market rout eroding ₹40 lakh crore.
West Asia crisis raises concerns on earnings growth, extending stock declines March 12.
news.summary:
Adani Enterprises, DLF, TCS fell sharply amid market rout eroding ₹40 lakh crore.
West Asia crisis raises concerns on earnings growth, extending stock declines March 12.

news.title:
Supreme Court orders CBI investigation into DLF's Gurugram project.
The directive was reported by CNBC TV18.
news.summary:
Supreme Court orders CBI investigation into DLF's Gurugram project.
The directive was reported by CNBC TV18.

news.title:
DLF Ltd. executed a block trade on NSE for ~415,881 shares at Rs. 571.40.
The total trade value was Rs. 23.76 Crores.
news.summary:
DLF Ltd. executed a block trade on NSE for ~415,881 shares at Rs. 571.40.
The total trade value was Rs. 23.76 Crores.

news.title:
Top 5 listed realtors' sales bookings rose 20% to ₹84,000 cr in Apr-Dec FY26.
Combined sales bookings of 28 listed realtors reached ₹1,32,569 cr, driven by luxury demand.
news.summary:
Top 5 listed realtors' sales bookings rose 20% to ₹84,000 cr in Apr-Dec FY26.
Combined sales bookings of 28 listed realtors reached ₹1,32,569 cr, driven by luxury demand.

news.title:
SC orders CBI probe into DLF Primus project over alleged irregularities.
Buyers claim incomplete infrastructure, unfair practices; case under SC review.
news.summary:
SC orders CBI probe into DLF Primus project over alleged irregularities.
Buyers claim incomplete infrastructure, unfair practices; case under SC review.

news.title:
DLF Ltd announced executive participation in 'Chasing Growth 2026' investor meet on 26th Feb in Mumbai.
Outcome of the event will be disclosed post-conference as per regulatory norms.
news.summary:
DLF Ltd announced executive participation in 'Chasing Growth 2026' investor meet on 26th Feb in Mumbai.
Outcome of the event will be disclosed post-conference as per regulatory norms.

news.title:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.
Stocks include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NBCC, Aditya Birla Capital, DLF, and others. ASM framework stocks also impacted.
news.summary:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.
Stocks include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NBCC, Aditya Birla Capital, DLF, and others. ASM framework stocks also impacted.

news.title:
NCLT approves merger of 8 DLF subsidiaries into Highvista Buildcon.
Highvista Buildcon will be fully owned by DLF post ROC submission.
news.summary:
NCLT approves merger of 8 DLF subsidiaries into Highvista Buildcon.
Highvista Buildcon will be fully owned by DLF post ROC submission.

news.title:
DLF and Phoenix Mills have shelved REIT plans due to strong cash flows and regulatory concerns, despite recent SEBI reforms easing REIT rules.
DLF expects Rs 6,000 crore rental income by FY27 and Phoenix focuses on asset expansion over income distribution. Tata Realty plans REIT in 2 years.
news.summary:
DLF and Phoenix Mills have shelved REIT plans due to strong cash flows and regulatory concerns, despite recent SEBI reforms easing REIT rules.
DLF expects Rs 6,000 crore rental income by FY27 and Phoenix focuses on asset expansion over income distribution. Tata Realty plans REIT in 2 years.

news.title:
Top realty developers reported stable to healthy Q3FY26 earnings despite Labour Code compliance costs.
Companies like Prestige Estates, Lodha, Oberoi, DLF, and Godrej Properties navigated the challenges effectively.
news.summary:
Top realty developers reported stable to healthy Q3FY26 earnings despite Labour Code compliance costs.
Companies like Prestige Estates, Lodha, Oberoi, DLF, and Godrej Properties navigated the challenges effectively.

news.title:
DLF expects strong Q3FY26 performance with significant disposable cash from FY27-28.
The company shared this outlook during an interaction with CNBC TV18.
news.summary:
DLF expects strong Q3FY26 performance with significant disposable cash from FY27-28.
The company shared this outlook during an interaction with CNBC TV18.

news.title:
Chris Wood of Jefferies removes ICICI Bank, DLF from portfolios, replacing them with Eternal and Zijin Mining.
ICICI Bank nears 52-week high of 1,500; DLF shares down 15% in last 12 months.
news.summary:
Chris Wood of Jefferies removes ICICI Bank, DLF from portfolios, replacing them with Eternal and Zijin Mining.
ICICI Bank nears 52-week high of 1,500; DLF shares down 15% in last 12 months.

news.title:
DLF signs agreement to transfer business operations with Makalu and Srijan.
DLF sells 17.75 acres to Gangapurana for ₹2.6B and IT/ITES SEZ for ₹4.1B.
news.summary:
DLF signs agreement to transfer business operations with Makalu and Srijan.
DLF sells 17.75 acres to Gangapurana for ₹2.6B and IT/ITES SEZ for ₹4.1B.

news.title:
DLF Ltd sold its IT/ITeS SEZ property and adjacent land in Kolkata for ₹670 crore.
The sale, subject to approvals, is expected to complete in 4 months.
news.summary:
DLF Ltd sold its IT/ITeS SEZ property and adjacent land in Kolkata for ₹670 crore.
The sale, subject to approvals, is expected to complete in 4 months.
